allScrapes.message: feat(questfest): feature heroes, King Bee OG image, deck polish
chore(questfest): deck cleanup — ETCon retired, scorecard removed, nav scrolls
chore(vercel): Blob billing runbook, deploy-info, and catalog cleanup
fix(questfest): keep playback alive across tab and in-app navigation
docs(press): Royal Flush King Bee release copy
feat(dph-gpu): King Bee papers, press release, playlist playback fixes
Add menu item detail pages with guest-channel WhatsApp broadcast and honor join flow.
Fix rich menu images on short URLs with absolute asset paths, hero art, and Vercel rewrites.
Add illustrated menu, WhatsApp channel flow, and transparent 33/67 tip split to Hire-A-Goldilocks-Valet-Concierge.
Launch Hire-A-Goldilocks-Valet-Concierge with menu-first landing, offer-and-acceptance flow, and SS Vibelandia deck skin.
Crystallize Old School, OGRP, and edge-honor transaction rules into NSPFRNP catalog.
Add Goldilocks Room Service frontend, whiteboard card, and expanded OGRP standalone docs.
Link jukebox brand to QUESTFEST landing page.
Add OGRP whitepaper, reproducible empirical pipeline, and PRA audit receipt.
Polish jukebox UX and keep bulk-upload catalog live.
Split jukebox browse/now-playing and fix bulk upload prompts.
Add plain minimum definition for Holographic Goldilocks AI OS.
Add member upload invitation and playlist visibility controls.
Fix iPhone jukebox player track info visibility.
Add Bridge explainer page and fix shared-track autoplay on master catalog.
Improve jukebox playlist rail and fix swipe-to-remove reveal.
Fix bulk-upload catalog persistence and elevate Sonic Singularity copy.
Add play-all, swipe remove, share, and one free full play on Listen.
Refactor jukebox layout: sticky hero, selected catalog, compact player.
Restyle jukebox playlist panel as classic catalog menu.
Replace jukebox page-up/down with scrollable track list.
Fix jukebox blank page, add playlist edit, and welcome copy.
Stop duplicate deletes from being restored by sync and upload index.
Fix duplicate track delete with batch server API and local purge.
Fix catalog upload persistence under bulk concurrent writes.
Point all Listen links to jukebox route and redirect legacy /bridge.
Add Golden Era jukebox Listen experience with playlist gestures and duplicate cleanup.
Streamline bulk uploader to one select with auto-upload progress.
Clarify that E1-E4 public-data experiments were executed.
Add public-data empirical tests to SYNTHOBS chromosomal papers.
Add SYNTHOBS chromosomal electrodynamics whitepapers with PRA pass.
Add bulk track uploader for 500+ files and fix player resume.
Fix Commons hero image on /commons short URL.
Add newscast briefing desk with hands-free flow and module navigation.
Restructure executive onboarding as presentation then practice.
Teach-first executive onboarding and fix blank QUESTFEST share QR.
Add My whiteboard quicklink to QUESTFEST landing page.
Add 54-minute executive AI onboarding module with hub and whiteboard links.
Add catalog search and QUESTFEST share QR quicklink.
sitewide gold palette: brand-gold-surfaces.css on every HTML page, sweep all blue/purple/teal text, rebuild player
door III: clear dev/researcher framing, walk through all key repos — SING13, digital-pru, egs-nlrf, hgt-psd, ac-hmm, eesm-gpu, seed kit
eliminate all blue/purple text on black — global a{} color in every CSS, fix ea-dm blue var, warm redirect stubs
get-started: list all 10 layers and 13 channels as numbered lists
fix nine→ten layers in i18n en.json (was overriding landing page at runtime) and blog aria-label
get-started: full foundation primer — 10 layers, 13 channels, live proof, sonic singularity; fix nine→ten throughout
fix 404s on onboarding pages — convert all relative links to absolute paths, add /sun short URL
remove Hear the ship and Open the player buttons (unnecessary, 404)
purge all blue/slate/teal text colors sitewide — warm palette only, no blue or purple on black
raise questfest landing page to Goldilocks standard — warm full palette, Cormorant tagline, purge all teal/slate-blue traces

Raise onboarding pages to Goldilocks standard. Full rewrites of Get Started, Listen, Look Under the Hood, and Look at the Sun — Cormorant pull quotes, narrative voice, gold/champagne/walnut palette throughout, no blue/purple. Add deck-pull and deck-statement to deck-surfaces.css. Fix voice-tier badge colors to match brand.
Add plain-speak Get Started and Listen primers for new users.
Mirror synthOBS J-Lens monitor into egs-trans research package.
Reframe EGS-TRANS catalog and README for frontier multi-model convergence.

honestyNote: Snapshots are GitHub commit permalinks captured at scrape time. They are immutable historical anchors for Path A timeline verification. Zero hits for a marker in sing4/sing9 is itself a snapshot receipt.
